title: Hepetis glaziovii

intro: Hepetis glaziovii, also known as Brazilian peppertree or feijoa, is a woody shrub or small tree native to South America, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The health benefits of Hepetis glaziovii include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
